name: Uniform Manufacturing & Custom Embroidery Services
description: Full in-house uniform manufacturing service covering product design and prototyping, premium knitted and woven fabric production, and precision custom logo embroidery — from initial thread-blend trials and fabric sampling through computerized embroidery and regional academy distribution.

itemOffered.name: Product Design & Prototyping
itemOffered.description: Digital design previews and physically stitched fabric samples delivered to school boards before bulk production.

itemOffered.name: Premium Knitted & Woven Fabric Manufacturing
itemOffered.description: High mechanical-stretch poly-viscose and combed cotton fabrics optimized for comfort during active school hours.

itemOffered.name: Precision Custom Embroidery
itemOffered.description: High thread-density computerized embroidery ensuring school logo crests remain crisp, colorfast, and durable.

itemOffered.name: Bulk School & Institutional Order Fulfilment
itemOffered.description: End-to-end bulk order management for schools, sports academies, and corporate/institutional buyers, from quote to dispatch.
